name: Research
desc: Gain +1 Tech.

name: Research2
desc:
Gain +1 Tech.
Bonus Passive: Crafting subtracts 1 Tech instead of all of it.

name: Discharge
desc: Spend all of your mana, then deal that much electric damage to an adjacent unit.

name: Discharge2
desc: Spend all of your mana, then deal that much electric damage to an adjacent unit with a 10% Stun chance for each point of mana spent.

name: Repair
desc: Repair 1 use to all of your or an adjacent unit's equipment.

name: Repair2
desc: Repair all uses to all of your or an adjacent unit's equipment.

name: Shoddy Jetpack
desc: Fly to a random tile in a large area. If you land on a unit, explode dealing 5 damage in an area (including to yourself).

name: ShoddyJetpack2
desc: Fly to any tile. If you land on a unit, explode dealing 5 damage in an area (including to yourself).

name: Spawn Decoy
desc: Spawn a decoy that explodes when it dies.

name: SpawnDecoy2
desc: Spawn a decoy that explodes when it dies. When an enemy targets you, swap places with the decoy.

name: Switcheroo
desc: Your next attack breaks your weapon, then craft a new one.

name: Switcheroo2
desc: Your next attack breaks your weapon, then gain +1 Tech and craft a weapon.

name: Spring Shoes
desc: Jump up to 2 tiles away.

name: SpringShoes2
desc: Jump up to 5 tiles away.

name: Flamethrower
desc: Shoot a flame that inflicts Burn.

name: Autopilot
desc: Take an extra turn after this one. You are AI controlled on that turn.

name: AutoPilot2
desc:
You or another unit takes an extra turn after this one. That unit is AI controlled on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Recycle
desc: Destroy your weapon to gain +1 Tech and refresh your basic action.

name: Recycle2
desc: Destroy your weapon to gain +1 Tech and refresh your basic action. This spell costs 1 mana if you haven't used your weapon this turn.

name: Build Turret
desc: Summon a turret.

name: BuildTurret2
desc: Summon a rocket turret.

name: Rocket Skates
desc: Dash forward in a straight line then explode dealing damage in an area (including to yourself).

name: RocketSkates2
desc: Dash forward in a straight line then explode dealing damage in an larger area (including to yourself).

name: Bombchu Dash
desc: Dash forward in a straight line then explode.

name: Drill Down
desc: Dig to an open tile in a straight line.

name: DrillDown2
desc: Dig to a tile in a straight line. If you dig into a unit, explode dealing 5 damage in an area (including to yourself).

name: Armor Up
desc: Craft a Tinkerer armor piece into one of your empty armor slots.

name: ArmorUp2
desc: Craft a Tinkerer armor piece into one of your or an adjacent unit's empty armor slots.

name: Fresh off the Forge
desc: Gain +7 [img:shield] and Burn 3.

name: FreshOffTheForge2
desc: Give +7 [img:shield] and Burn 3 to yourself or an adjacent unit.

name: Electric Nail
desc: Summon a nail that arcs electricity to neighboring tiles whenever any unit spends mana.

name: ElectricNail2
desc:
Summon a nail that arcs electricity to neighboring tiles whenever any unit spends mana.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Craft
desc: Craft and equip a random temporary weapon.

name: Craft2
desc: Craft and equip a random temporary weapon for yourself or an ally in range 3 (if they have an empty weapon slot).

name: Shockwave
desc: Deal damage to all units. The closer a unit is to you the more damage it takes.

name: Shockwave2
desc:
Deal damage to all units. The closer a unit is to you the more damage it takes.
[s:.7](Deals more damage to closer units and less damage to further units.)[/s]

name: Math!
desc: Deal 1 damage to a unit for each unique divisor in its current HP value.

name: Math2
desc: Deal 1 damage to a unit for each unique divisor in its current HP value. If its HP was a prime number, gain 5 mana.

name: Reprogram
desc: Conjure a random spell of your class as a bonus ability.

name: Reprogram2
desc: Conjure a random upgraded spell of your class as a bonus ability.

name: Improve
desc: Gain +1 to a random stat.

name: Improve2
desc: You or an adjacent unit gain +1 to 2 random stats.

name: Catbot
desc:
Spawn a Catbot and give it your current weapon.
[s:.7](You will not get the weapon back)[/s]

name: Catbot2
desc:
Spawn a Catbot and give it your current weapon. Gain +1 Tech and refresh your basic action.
[s:.7](You will not get the weapon back)[/s]

name: Bombchu
desc: Spawn a Bombchu bot.

name: Bombchu2
desc:
Spawn a Bombchu bot in range 4.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Remote Detonator
desc: Explode a familiar, dealing 5 damage with knockback in an area.

name: RemoteDetonator2
desc:
Explode a familiar, dealing 5 damage with knockback in an area.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Short Circuit
desc: Deal 1 electric damage with a random amount of knockback (up to 3) to all adjacent units.

name: ShortCircuit2
desc: Deal 2 electric damage with a random amount of knockback (up to 10) to all adjacent units.

name: Electrolyze
desc: Give your weapon +3 electric damage.

name: Electrolyze2
desc:
Give your weapon +3 electric damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Eject Button
desc: Explode and fly to a random tile at least four tiles away. This explosion damages you.

name: EjectButton2
desc:
Explode and fly to a random tile at least four tiles away. This explosion damages you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Firecracker
desc: Throw 3 small 1-damage explosives at random tiles in an area.

name: Firecrackers2
desc: Throw small 1-damage explosives at all tiles in an area.

name: Upgrade
desc: Fully heal a familiar and give it All Stats Up.

name: Upgrade2
desc: Fully heal a familiar and give it All Stats Up and +1 [img:divineshield].

name: Eureka!
desc:
Gain +3 Tech and Madness 1.
[s:.7](This spell can only be cast once per battle.)[/s]

name: Eureka!
desc:
Gain +3 Tech.
[s:.7](This spell can only be cast once per battle.)[/s]

name: Punchbot
desc: Spawn a Rubber Fist Bot.

name: PunchBot2
desc: Spawn a Rubber Fist Bot within a large range.

name: Fast Hands
desc: Refresh your weapon and trinket actions (unless they gain you mana).

name: FastHands2
desc: Refresh your weapon and trinket actions (unless they gain you mana). Repair 1 use to all of your equipment.

name: Mech Punch
desc: Dash-punch with Knockback 3.

name: Eject!
desc: Launch yourself out of the mech. Deal damage to units you land on and yourself.

name: Barrage
desc: Fire the machine guns!

name: Thrusters
desc: Dash forward and light fires in your path.

name: Mech Suit
desc:
Summon a mech suit that can be piloted.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: MechSuit2
desc:
Summon a mech suit that can be piloted.
[s:.7](Costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Unreliable Shield Generator
desc: Gain +6 [img:shield] and +1 temporary Brace. This spell has a 75% chance to be disabled on each turn.

name: UnreliableShield2
desc:
Get +6 [img:shield] and +1 temporary Brace. This spell has a 66% chance to be disabled on each turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Unreliable Missile Launcher
desc: Shoot an explosive homing missile at a random enemy. This spell has a 75% chance to be disabled on each turn.

name: UnreliableMissile2
desc:
Shoot an explosive homing missile at a random enemy. This spell has a 66% chance to be disabled on each turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Spare Parts
desc: Destroy your weapon and gain one of the following: +2 [img:shield], +4 Charge, +1 Thorns, or 1 coin.

name: SpareParts2
desc: Destroy your weapon and gain one of the following: +4 [img:shield], +8 Charge, +2 Thorns, or 2 coins.

name: Split the Atom
desc:
Deal 50 damage to and inflict Burn 10 on all enemies. You can pay for this spell over multiple turns.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost can't be modified.)[/s]

name: BatteryNuke2
desc:
Deal 50 damage to and inflict Burn 10 on all enemies. You can pay for this spell over multiple turns.
This spell absorbs the mana you spend casting other spells.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost can't be modified.)[/s]

name: Experimental Teleporter
desc: Teleport to any tile. You have a 15% chance to equip a piece of Fly armor that breaks any armor pieces it replaces.

name: ExperimentalTeleporter2
desc:
Teleport to any tile. You have a 15% chance to equip a piece of Fly armor that breaks any armor pieces it replaces.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Shock Therapy
desc: Deal 1 electric damage to yourself or an adjacent unit. Cleanse debuffs from that unit, give it a random stat up, and a 25% chance to be Stunned.

name: ShockTherapy2
desc: Deal 1 electric damage to yourself or a unit in range 5. Cleanse debuffs from that unit, give it a random stat up, and a 25% chance to be Stunned.

name: Build Nuke
desc: Spawn a mini-nuke that makes a HUGE explosion when it dies.

name: BuildNuke2
desc: Spawn a mini-nuke in range 4 that makes a HUGE explosion when it dies.

name: Instant Barrier
desc:
Gain +6 [img:shield].
Castable only if you have no [img:shield].

name: InstantBarrier2
desc:
Gain +6 [img:shield].
This spell's mana cost is equal to your current [img:shield].

name: Volt Tackle
desc: Teleport to anything that's electrically conductive. Displace units you teleport onto and deal electric damage to them.

name: VoltTackle2
desc: Teleport to anything that's electrically conductive. Displace units you teleport onto and deal electric damage to them with a 50% chance to inflict Stun.

name: Smash
desc: Smash your weapon onto an adjacent unit, destroying it and dealing double its damage.

name: Smash2
desc:
Smash your weapon onto an adjacent unit, destroying it and dealing double its damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Shed Scrap
desc: Lose 1 [img:shield]. Spawn a junk pile.

name: ShedScrap2
desc: Lose 1 [img:shield]. Spawn a junk pile in range 2.

name: Repair Armor
desc: Lose all [img:shield], then gain [img:shield] equal to your equipment's starting [img:shield].

name: Repair Armor
desc: Lose all [img:shield], then give [img:shield] equal to your equipment's starting [img:shield] to yourself or another ally.

name: Rocket Ride
desc: Jump to any open tile. Explode when you land. (This explosion also damages you.)

name: RocketRide2
desc:
Jump to any open tile. Explode when you land. (This explosion also damages you.)
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Robo-Vac
desc: Spawn a vacuum bot that collects pickups and shares their effects with you.

name: RoboVac2
desc: Spawn a vacuum bot that collects pickups and shares their effects with your whole team.

name: Nurse Bot
desc: Spawn a nurse bot that heals allies.

name: NurseBot2
desc:
Spawn a nurse bot that heals allies.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Tesla Coil
desc: Spawn a tesla coil that shoots lightning bolts at random units with a small chance to inflict Stun.

name: TeslaCoil2
desc: Spawn a tesla coil in range 7 that shoots lightning bolts at random units with a small chance to inflict Stun.

name: Refine Materials
desc: Collect a pickup in range 3. Instead of its normal effect, gain +1 Tech.

name: RefineMaterials2
desc: Collect a pickup in range 3. Instead of its normal effect, gain +1 Tech, +1 [img:shield], and +1 to a random stat.

name: Fabricate
desc: Give an ally in range 3 a temporary copy of your weapon, if they don't have a weapon.

name: Fabricate2
desc:
Give an ally in range 3 a temporary copy of your weapon, if they don't have a weapon.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Sparks
desc: Shoot electric bolts at up to 3 random enemies or robots.

name: Sparks2
desc: Shoot electric bolts at up to 5 random enemies or robots.

name: Hone
desc: Repair 1 use to your weapon and give it +1 damage for the rest of the battle.

name: Hone2
desc: Repair 1 use to your weapon and give it +1 damage for the rest of the battle. Refresh your weapon action.
